name: Clarifying Cloudy Consommes- Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Leek, green leaves, washed and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Clarifying Cloudy Consomme:
1. Mix the vegetables with egg whites.
2. When the consomme is cold, add the vegetable and egg whites mixture and bring to a boil.
3. Lower the heat. A crust will form on the top.
4. Let the consomme simmer until clear.
5. Strain by moving the crust to the side and pouring through cheesecloth without breaking the crust.
